close_reason: Cannot use version.workspace=true — these 3 crates are at 0.3.1 while workspace is 0.3.0. Switching would downgrade published versions. Requires bumping workspace version to 0.3.1 (affects all crates) — a release decision, not a review fix.
description: secretx-gcp-sm/Cargo.toml, secretx-wolfhsm/Cargo.toml, and secretx-keyring/Cargo.toml each declare version = '0.3.1' as a literal string. Every other backend crate uses version.workspace = true. On the next workspace version bump those three crates will be skipped by any automated bump tooling (cargo-release, cargo-workspaces), causing a split-version workspace where those three crates stay at 0.3.1 while all others advance. Fix: change version = '0.3.1' to version.workspace = true in all three crates' [package] sections.
title: 3 crates hardcode version instead of version.workspace
